duplicates.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Electric Vehicle Charging Station Outage Signals Consumer Tech Stress

duplicate_of.matched_title: daily spike in google trends for electric vehicle charging station outage signals bearish xlc

idea.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Electric Vehicle Charging Station Outage Signals Consumer Tech Stress
idea.thesis: Spikes in EV charging outage searches indicate rising consumer frustration and potential demand softening. Consumer tech and EV-related sectors suffer when infrastructure stress impacts user experience.
data_sources: Google Trends daily search interest for 'electric vehicle charging station outage'
idea.signal_logic: Enter short XLC if daily Google Trends for 'electric vehicle charging station outage' rises 40%+ over 3-day average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLC if daily Google Trends for 'electric vehicle charging station outage' rises 40%+ over 3-day average Exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if searches normalize
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily search interest for 'electric vehicle charging station outage' via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV infrastructure issues frequently cause short-term consumer attention spikes.

duplicates.title: Weekly Jump In Google Trends For Job Quitting Searches Signals Labor Market Stress

duplicate_of.matched_title: weekly jump in google trends for job quitting searches signals labor market tightness benefiting financial sector

idea.title: Weekly Jump In Google Trends For Job Quitting Searches Signals Labor Market Stress
idea.thesis: Rising interest in quitting jobs signals growing labor market dissatisfaction or turnover risk. High labor turnover signals operational disruption and cost pressure on industrial companies.
data_sources: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'job quitting'
idea.signal_logic: Enter short XLI if weekly Google Trends for 'job quitting' rises by 20%+ WoW
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLI if weekly Google Trends for 'job quitting' rises by 20%+ WoW Exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if the trend declines by 10% WoW
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest for 'job quitting' via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor market stress terms have strong seasonal and cyclical weekly interest fluctuations.

schema.idea: Weekly Jump In Google Trends For 'Job Quitting' Searches Signals Labor Market Stress

market_impact.rationale: High labor turnover signals operational disruption and cost pressure on industrial companies.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if weekly Google Trends for 'job quitting' rises by 20%+ WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if the trend declines by 10% WoW

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor market stress terms have strong seasonal and cyclical weekly interest fluctuations.
